theme: Mix pigments to match a color under many lights
title: Metamer-Proof Pigment Recipe
strategies: trivial: uniform mixture over the whole palette (checker's own baseline)
greedy: Frank-Wolfe fit of the target's tristimulus point under only the first illuminant, wrongly assuming pure-pigment reflectances mix linearly -- falls for cheap metameric decoy pigments

strong: invert the Kubelka-Munk formula to get a per-band linear residual in concentrations, then Frank-Wolfe fit the FULL reflectance spectrum (all bands at once) -- illuminant-invariant by construction
invalid: negative, non-normalized concentration vector (must score 0)
